name: Overnight French Toast & Cinnamon Syrup
recipeIngredient: Italian Bread slices (8 each 1/2 inch thick)
recipeInstructions:
1. To prepare French Toast: In a medium-sized bowl, whisk together egg, egg whites, milk Skim, sugar, vanilla extract, cinnamon, and baking powder until well blended.
2. Place bread slices in a large shallow baking dish and pour the egg mixture over the top; turn to coat evenly.
3. Press a piece of wax paper directly on the bread to cover it, then cover dish with plastic wrap.
4. Refrigerate overnight.
5. To make Cinnamon Syrup: In a small saucepan, stir together sugar, corn syrup, cinnamon and 1/4 cup water. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium-high heat, stirring constantly. Boil for 2 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in evaporated skim milk. Let cool; transfer to a small pitcher.
6. To cook French Toast: Heat vegetable oil and butter (1 t) in a 12-inch nonstick skillet over medium-high heat.
7. Add four of the soaked bread slices to the pan and cook until golden on both sides, 2 to 3 minutes per side. Transfer the toast to a platter and keep warm in a warm oven.
8. Cook the remaining slices in the same manner, using the remaining vegetable oil and butter. Serve with Cinnamon Syrup.
